description: Dashboard enhancement: richer data display with more market indicators, sector performance, top movers, and professional Bloomberg-style layout
steps: Enhance dashboard/templates/index.html to add more data sections making it feel like a Bloomberg terminal: (1) Add 'Sector Performance' heatmap section showing major sectors (Tech, Healthcare, Finance, Energy, Consumer) with color-coded performance. (2) Add 'Top Movers' section showing biggest gainers/losers from hot tickers data. (3) Add 'Market Breadth' indicator (advance/decline ratio visualization). (4) Add 'Augur Consensus Leaderboard' section showing top-rated stocks from recent analyses (from localStorage cache).
Add /api/sector-performance endpoint in dashboard/app.py that returns sector ETF performance data (XLK, XLV, XLF, XLE, XLY, XLP, XLI, XLU) via yfinance. Gracefully degrade if yfinance unavailable.
Enhance the existing market overview section with more indices: add HSI (Hang Seng), FTSE, DAX, Nikkei alongside existing SPY, QQQ, etc.
Add a 'News Sentiment' placeholder section that shows the current market mood based on VIX + market breadth indicators already fetched.
Ensure all new sections have proper skeleton loading states and graceful degradation when data is unavailable.
acceptance_criteria: Dashboard index.html has sector performance, top movers, market breadth sections
/api/sector-performance returns sector data or graceful degradation
All sections have loading skeletons and error states
Overall dashboard feels data-rich like Bloomberg terminal
